The '''Neelabi''' were a shy, fish-like [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Neelabi]] who could only breathe in [[Water/Legends|water]]. They could be easily identified by their beady eyes and short stature. The podracer [[Occo Ninebar]] was forced to race in a [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] with a water filled bubble. Thus, if he crashed, he could not escape quickly if his cockpit was thrust into a wall.

{{Species-stub}}
